summary: Tested commission balance feature: Real commissions (skip_deposit=false) create deposits AND affect balance through balance_commission field. Historical corrections (skip_deposit=true) are display-only. All tests PASSED.
seed_data_creation: Created test commission records with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission balance feature verified. Two commission fields in tradeLogs: 'commission' (all, for display) and 'balance_commission' (only real, for balance calc). In profitCalculations.js lines 255, 281, 408, balance calculations use 'balance_commission' only. Backend POST /api/profit/commission accepts skip_deposit field - when true, commission is saved but no deposit created.

commission_skip_deposit_true_no_deposit.test: skip_deposit=true saves commission but NO deposit created

skip_deposit_field_saved_on_commission.test: Commission records correctly save skip_deposit field

adjust_commission_dialog_checkbox.helper_text: Check this to record past commissions without adding to your account balance

commission_column_display.test: Commission column shows all commissions (both real and historical)

total_commission_summary_card.test: Total Commission card shows sum of all commissions

balance_formula_with_commission.formula: Next Day Balance Before = Last Day Balance Before + Actual Profit + Commission
balance_formula_with_commission.calculation: $18,360.44 + $290.85 = $18,651.29 (commission from Jan 15 was $0, so not included)
balance_formula_with_commission.result: PASS - Balance Before matches expected value

verified_elements: Historical correction only checkbox (UNCHECKED by default)

profitCalculations.js.line_255: profitsFromThisMonthOnwards uses balance_commission for balance calculations

ProfitTrackerPage.jsx.line_574-585: Commission merge separates commission vs balance_commission based on skip_deposit flag

profit_routes.py.line_50: CommissionCreate model has skip_deposit: bool = False field
profit_routes.py.line_493-505: Deposit only created if not skip_deposit
